creator: david@wood2.org.uk
text:
FreeRADIUS 1.x has now been superseded by FreeRADIUS 2.x (the 
net/freeradius2 port).


The SNMP code has been removed from the FreeRADIUS CVS HEAD - this 
change will become effective from FreeRADIUS 2.0.6. The removed code 
relied on the deprecated SMUX protocol and wasn't 64 bit safe.

In place of SNMP, FreeRADIUS 2.0.6 will have a new statistics feature 
which is implemented over RADIUS protocols. There has been some interest 
in adding AgentX functionality on top of the statistics feature to 
create a modern SNMP implementation, but it is not clear when or if this 
will be done.


As net/freeradius / FreeRADIUS 1.x and FreeRADIUS' SNMP implementation 
have both been superseded, I believe this PR should be closed.



Best wishes,




David (net/freeradius and net/freeradius2 maintainer)
-- 
David Wood
david@wood2.org.uk
